title: Hoot Kids Pop Up Sun Tent with UPF 50+ UV Protection, Beach Shelter Play Tent for Outdoor and Garden, Blue, Ages 3+
features: UV PROTECTION: UPF 50+ sun protection tent shields children from harmful UV rays, making it ideal for beach days and outdoor garden play
INSTANT SETUP: Pop-up design allows for quick and effortless assembly in seconds without any tools or complicated instructions required
VERSATILE USE: Perfect for the beach, garden, park, or indoor play, providing a shaded shelter for children aged 3 years and above
COMPACT DIMENSIONS: Measures 87cm x 65cm x 65cm (H x W x D) when assembled, offering ample space for kids whilst remaining lightweight and portable
CONVENIENT STORAGE: Folds down flat into a compact size for easy transportation and storage, complete with carrying bag for trips and outings
description: This vibrant pop-up sun tent from Hoot is the perfect outdoor companion for children aged 3 and above. Designed to provide essential sun protection with UPF 50+ UV shielding, this beach shelter creates a safe and shaded space for little ones to play, whether at the seaside or in the garden. The eye-catching blue design with orange trim makes it easy to spot, whilst the pop-up mechanism means setup is quick and effortless—simply remove from the bag and watch it spring into shape. Measuring approximately 87cm x 95cm x 85cm, this lightweight tent offers ample room for children to enjoy their outdoor adventures whilst staying protected from harmful sun rays. The portable design makes it ideal for beach trips, park visits, camping excursions, or simply creating a fun play space in your own back garden. When playtime is over, the tent folds down compactly for convenient storage and transport. Give your children their own special outdoor retreat where they can play comfortably and safely in the sunshine.
